candidate_definitions.text: WebSocket & WAMP in Java for Android and Java 8
Client library providing [WAMP](http://wamp-proto.org/) on Java 8 ([Netty](https://netty.io/)) and Android, plus (secure) WebSocket for Android.
LambdaTest - Lambda-enabled functional testing API on top of JUnit and TestNG

on: [push, pull_request] jobs: build: strategy: fail-fast: false matrix: os: [ubuntu-latest] java-version: [8, 11] runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }} steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v2 with: fetch-depth: 0 - uses: actions/setup-java@v1 with: java-version: ${{ matrix.java-version }} - run…
